Economic Independence, , , which provided that Secretary of Housing and Urban Development was to immediately implement and that other Federal agencies authorized to assist low-income families were to take similar steps to encourage economic independence and the accumulation of assets, was repealed retroactive to , by , , , which further provided that was to be of no effect.Pub.
